nodes.label: UEM Icon Set: Device Management, Security, Cross-Device Enrollment, Compliance Checklist
nodes.description: A set of four blue-toned flat/isometric icons on a transparent background representing core UEM (Unified Endpoint Management) concepts: (1) a 3D hexagon/cube with a gear symbolizing device configuration or settings management; (2) a shield with a key and checkmark symbolizing security and access control; (3) a mobile phone and desktop monitor with an Apple logo and sync arrows symbolizing cross-device (mobile + desktop) enrollment and management; (4) a clipboard/checklist with checkboxes and a checkmark symbolizing compliance auditing or policy checklists.

nodes.label: UEM Cloud Device Management Illustration
nodes.description: Isometric blue-toned illustration depicting unified endpoint management (UEM) cloud ecosystem. Shows a central cloud connected to multiple managed devices (laptop, tablet, smartphone), a security shield with padlock, gear/settings icons representing policy or configuration management, and floating vendor/app logos (including Jamf 'J', Samsung 'S', and others). Represents cloud-based device management, endpoint security, and multi-vendor MDM/UEM platform integration.

icon_group.description: Abstract petal/leaf icon with ellipse connector, white fill, hidden via display:none

nodes.label: UEM Architect Color Brand Mark (Icon Only)

metadata.description: Color SVG brand mark icon for UEM Architect Consulting. Contains a two-petal/leaf abstract icon with a connecting ellipse. Left petal fill: #3d5a80 (opacity 0.8), right petal fill: #5b8dc9 (opacity 0.7), base ellipse fill: #7ab8f5 (opacity 0.6). Text elements (wordmark and consulting label) are present but hidden (display:none).

nodes.label: UEM Architect Color Logo (Google-Optimized, Icon Only)
nodes.description: Google-optimized icon-only variant of the UEM Architect brand logo. Composed of three abstract geometric shapes forming a stylized mark: a dark navy/slate arc segment (upper-left), a medium blue arc segment (right), and a light sky-blue ellipse (center-bottom). No wordmark or text is present. Color palette aligns with brand tokens: --navy (#2b4570), --blue (#00b4d8), --sky (#90e0ef). Likely used for Google Business Profile, Google Workspace, or favicon contexts requiring a square/icon-safe crop.

UEM Architect Color Logo (Mark Only, Large)
nodes.description: UEM Architect brand mark without text. Abstract logomark composed of three shapes on a white background: a dark navy-blue curved leaf/arc shape on the left, a medium steel-blue curved leaf/arc shape on the right, and a light sky-blue ellipse at the bottom center. Color palette aligns with brand tokens: navy (#2b4570), blue (#00b4d8), and sky (#90e0ef). No wordmark present — icon only. Larger variant suitable for high-visibility or display use.

nodes.label: UEM/Cybersecurity Services Illustration — 2x2 grid of flat-style blue security icons

Group of people (team/organization) alongside a large security shield with key — organizational security / team identity protection concept
